productDisplayName: Fila Men Drake White Sports Shoes
description: Soccer shoes for men from fila. For the fashionable soccer fan, these shoes combine style with performance. Enhanced foot support and lugs for superior grip make this shoe a great buy. This shoe makes for excellent casual wear. Pair it with training shorts and a tee or your favourite denims and a polo t-shirt.UpperSynthetic leather upper with leather overlays and stitch detailing for good shoe structureCentral lacing system Padded tongue with embroidered brandingCushioned inner with mesh liningPadded sockliner with embroidered brandingOutsole reinforced at the heel cup and toe box for abrasion-free comfortOutsoleUpper glued to the outsole for durabilityTPR outsole with terraced grooves on the fore foot and back footGeometrical lugs with grooves on the midfoot area for enhanced gripShoe careWipe with damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
